title: Coruscant Control Tower One
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Coruscant Control Tower One''', also known as '''Tower One''', was part of the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[Coruscant One]], which was located above [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic era|era]] in [[23 ABY/Legends|23 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: The Lost Ones]]''
